Awesome Egocentric Atlas

Find datasets, benchmarks, models, and tools for egocentric vision, embodied AI and robotics, video-language, long-context memory, AR/VR, and hand-object interaction.

Access Status

Add a Resource

Missing a resource? Open a short issue with the source, access status, and license notes.
